abilities.name: Terrifying (Living) (12)
abilities.description: Enemy Living must pass TN 12 Horror Duel when ending turn in engagement range or targeting.

actions: (1) Mechanical Claws (Pneumatic) | AV: 4? (11?) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 3/4/6 damage. ? Critical Strike: When damaging, +1 per ?.

(1) Heavy Chain Harpoon (Pneumatic/Grace) | AV: 3? (11?) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 3/4/6 damage, gains Slow. Fire once/turn. ? Pull and Drag: After damaging, push target 4 yards toward this character.
(2) Flurry | Discard Twist Card for three 1 AP Close Combat attacks vs single target.
(0) Advanced Protocols | Discard card to heal 3 damage. End all Weak and Moderate Critical Effects.
system.notes: Construct peacekeeper enforcer. Heavy pneumatic augmentation. Mechanical claws and harpoon. Terrifies Living creatures. Advanced healing/repair protocols.
